title: Cinematic Web Experience
baselinePrompt: Make a cool website for my AI product.
beautifulUiPrompt: Use beautiful-ui, platform-web-ui, cinematic-web-experience, and ui-verification. Build a demo-worthy cinematic web experience with a focal scene, particles, bloom, glass panels, scroll reveal, reduced-motion fallback, mobile fallback, screenshots, and nonblank media checks.
expectedDelta: Moves from a dark gradient landing page to a justified cinematic technology choice, focal scene, motion model, fallback plan, and visual verification.
